concept: Paraphrase / To Create a Clearer Path
description: The act of restating a text or passage in other words, often to achieve greater clarity. It is a key practice in mindful communication, ensuring shared understanding.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 're' (a bridge), 'so' (clarity, light), and 'la' (path). The word's structure literally means 'a bridge to a clear path.' This frames paraphrasing as a helpful act of building a new, clearer pathway to an idea for the benefit of the listener.
